hooks.command: echo '=== Git Status ===' && git status --short && echo '' && echo '=== Current Branch ===' && git branch --show-current && echo '' && echo '=== Recent Commits ===' && git log --oneline -5 && echo '' && echo '=== Java Version ===' && java -version 2>&1

echo "$CLAUDE_TOOL_INPUT" | python3 -c "import sys, json; d=json.load(sys.stdin); f=d.get('path','') or d.get('file_path',''); exit(0 if f.endswith('.java') else 1)" && ./mvnw spotless:apply -q || true
